news.title: Bermuda Accelerates EV Transition with New EVolve Policy Guidelines
news.summary: The Department of Energy launches updated guidelines under the EVolve Policy to support public vehicle electrification.
news.content: Bermuda is moving forward in its transit electrification. The Department of Energy has released the EVolve Policy Implementation Plan, detailing support structures for both residential chargers and fleet operators. The policy aims to support the Department of Public Transportation's ongoing bus electrification, transitioning 50% of the public fleet by 2027.

news.title: BHC Community Solar Programme Launches Phase 1
news.summary: Solar installations begin on low-income residential units under the Bermuda Housing Corporation partnership.
news.content: In partnership with the Bermuda Housing Corporation (BHC), the Department of Energy has commenced Phase 1 of the Community Solar Programme. This project installs solar PV systems on BHC-managed residential blocks, directly reducing electricity bills for tenants and feeding clean energy back into the national grid.

news.title: Bermuda Space & Satellite consultation document released
news.summary: Public feedback requested on the outer space legislative framework and commercial satellite filing fees.
news.content: The Department of Energy, in coordination with international partners, has released a consultation document concerning Bermuda's satellite filing processes and outer space legislation. This document outlines administrative fee schedules, coordination requirements, and space insurance regulations.

settings.featuredTip: Switch to energy-efficient LED light bulbs to reduce lighting electricity usage by up to 80%.

energyGuides.title: Solar PV Homeowner Guide
energyGuides.summary: A comprehensive guide explaining solar installation, net metering, utility rates, and how to select a registered installer.
energyGuides.keyTakeaways:
1. Save up to 40% on bills.
2. Select certified installers.
3. Net metering allows selling power back.

energyGuides.title: Energy Efficient Air Conditioning Guide
energyGuides.summary: Learn how to choose and operate energy-efficient air conditioners to save money during hot Bermuda summers.
energyGuides.keyTakeaways:
1. Set thermostat to 24°C.
2. Clean filters monthly.
3. Choose inverter-based units.

energyGuides.title: Computer & Office Electronics Energy Guide
energyGuides.summary: Maximize energy efficiency for desktop computers, laptops, monitors, printers, and home office setups.
energyGuides.keyTakeaways:
1. Turn off computers and monitors when not in use.
2. Use smart power strips to eliminate phantom standby loads.
3. Configure power management settings to sleep after 15 minutes of inactivity.

energyGuides.title: Energy Efficient Refrigerator Guide
energyGuides.summary: Tips on selecting Energy Star refrigerators and optimization strategies to reduce cooling costs in Bermuda.
energyGuides.keyTakeaways:
1. Set refrigerator temp to 3-4°C and freezer to -18°C.
2. Clean condenser coils twice a year to maintain airflow.
3. Keep the refrigerator well-stocked to retain cold air.

energyGuides.title: Home Lighting Efficiency Guide
energyGuides.summary: A guide to upgrading home lighting to modern LED bulbs and implementing automated control systems.
energyGuides.keyTakeaways:
1. Replace old incandescent bulbs with Energy Star LEDs.
2. LEDs use up to 80% less energy and last 25x longer.
3. Install motion sensors, timers, or smart dimmers for outdoor lighting.

energyGuides.title: Solar Water Heater Installation Guide
energyGuides.summary: Use Bermuda's abundant sunlight to heat domestic water, reducing utility demand and heating bills.
energyGuides.keyTakeaways:
1. Solar water heaters can provide up to 80% of domestic hot water.
2. Inquire about government incentives and import duty exemptions.
3. Ensure professional roof mounting for wind resistance.

energyGuides.title: Water Heater Efficiency Guide
energyGuides.summary: Improve the performance of conventional water heaters and learn about tankless on-demand options.
energyGuides.keyTakeaways:
1. Wrap water heater tanks in insulation blankets.
2. Lower thermostat settings to 50°C (120°F).
3. Drain tanks annually to remove sediment and minerals.

energyGuides.title: Electric Vehicle Buyer & Charger Guide
energyGuides.summary: An overview of electric vehicles (EVs) suitable for Bermuda, charging guidelines, and road tax exemptions.
energyGuides.keyTakeaways:
1. EVs cost about 60% less to operate than petrol cars.
2. Install a Level 2 home charger for overnight charging.
3. Enjoy zero road tax for the first year of registration.

energyGuides.title: Television & Media Center Energy Guide
energyGuides.summary: Manage power consumption of smart TVs, gaming consoles, soundbars, and streaming devices.
energyGuides.keyTakeaways:
1. Enable automatic brightness control or Eco Mode on your TV.
2. Disable standby mode or quick-start on electronics.
3. Unplug game consoles or use smart power outlets.

energyGuides.title: Washing Machine & Laundry Efficiency Guide
energyGuides.summary: Get the most out of washing machines and dryers by adjusting wash cycles and load sizes.
energyGuides.keyTakeaways:
1. Wash clothes in cold water to save 90% of laundry energy.
2. Run full loads to maximize water and power efficiency.
3. Clean the lint filter in the dryer after every load.

energyGuides.title: Space Heater Safety & Efficiency Guide
energyGuides.summary: Guidelines on operating space heaters efficiently and safely during chilly winter months in Bermuda.
energyGuides.keyTakeaways:
1. Use zone heating to warm only the room you are in.
2. Choose thermostatic models that shut off automatically.
3. Place heaters away from curtains, furniture, and water.

energyGuides.title: Micro Wind Turbine Installation Guide
energyGuides.summary: An assessment of wind energy feasibility for coastal properties and small-scale wind turbine technologies.
energyGuides.keyTakeaways:
1. Micro wind turbines require consistent coastal winds.
2. Consult planning regulations regarding height limits.
3. Best used in hybrid configuration with solar PV panels.
